# Security Policy

## BlackRoad OS, Inc. - Security

This software is proprietary and confidential. All security matters are handled
directly by BlackRoad OS, Inc.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x     | Yes                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**DO NOT** open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.

Please report security vulnerabilities by emailing: **security@blackroad.io**

You will receive a response within 48 hours. Please include:

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (if any)

## Security Measures

- All GitHub Actions pinned to specific commit hashes
- Dependabot enabled for automated dependency updates
- CodeQL analysis runs on every push and PR
- Secret scanning enabled
- Dependency review on all pull requests
- Automated security audits via CI pipeline

## Disclosure Policy

BlackRoad OS, Inc. follows responsible disclosure practices. We will:

1. Acknowledge receipt within 48 hours
2. Provide an estimated timeline for a fix
3. Notify you when the vulnerability is resolved
